title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Instructional Designer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
